programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.[S]

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.[S]

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.[S]

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip![S]

programme.title: Murder Most Puzzling
programme.desc: A famous face returns to Bakerbury, stirring up the past and triggering tensions. As emotions run high and secrets unravel, The Puzzle Lady faces one of her toughest challenges yet. (S1 Ep3/3)[AD,S]

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.[S]

programme.title: New: Love Nature
programme.desc: The rivers of the Cairngorms are alive with wildlife - from salmon to otters, dippers to kingfishers. At night, camps of bats glide over water in search of food before they hibernate. (S1 Ep34)[S]

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan visits the south Scottish Glens and the Isle of Arran, uncovering hidden treasures, enjoying local festivals, and exploring art installations and whisky distilleries. (S8 Ep5)[S]

programme.title: New: Celebrity Puzzling
programme.desc: Jeremy Vine is joined by team captains Sally Lindsay and Carol Vorderman and their guests: gold medal-winning Paralympian Jonnie Peacock and Jenny Ryan from The Chase. (S2 Ep23)[S]

programme.title: New: Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time
programme.desc: ...Hospital Through Time. A look back at hospital food over the centuries, the work of renowned doctor William Harvey and a cancer treatment that temporarily makes a patient radioactive. (Ep6/6)[S]

programme.title: New: Warship: Life on the Frontline
programme.desc: ...Frontline. JJ Chalmers gets exclusive access to HMS Prince of Wales, the Royal Navy's biggest British warship as she prepares for the most dangerous leg of its epic eight-month deployment.

programme.title: New: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: In Birmingham, staff handle a severe asthma attack and a brutal assault. In Tunbridge Wells, a patient collapses in triage, leaving the team fighting to save his life. (S6 Ep8)

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: There's major trauma when a hay bale lands on a farmer's head in a remote location. Plus, a battle to save a man in cardiac arrest, and a 76-year-old woman has fallen down the stairs. (S3 Ep3)[AD,S]

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ

गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా
programme.desc: Miley Stewart, an average teenage girl, lives a double life as a famous pop singer named Hannah Montana and constantly tries to conceal her true identity from the public.
माइली स्टीवर्ट, एक औसत किशोरी लड़की, हन्ना मोंटाना नामक एक प्रसिद्ध पॉप गायिका के रूप में दोहरी जिंदगी जीती है और लगातार अपनी असली पहचान जनता से छिपाने की कोशिश करती है।
பிரபல பாடகியான மைலி, ஹானா மோன்டனா பெயரில் இரட்டை வாழ்க்கை வாழ்வதோடு, தனது உண்மையான அடையாளத்தை மறைக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
మైలీ స్టీవర్ట్ అనే ఒక సాధారణ అమ్మాయి, హన్నా మోంటానా అనే ప్రసిద్ధ పాప్ సింగర్‌గా ద్వంద్వ జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Justin Russo must shed his mortality in order to mentor his wizard niece, Billie, and help her get her powers under control.
जस्टिन रूसो को अपनी जादूगरनी भतीजी बिली का मार्गदर्शन करने और उसकी शक्तियों को नियंत्रित करने में मदद करने के लिए अपनी नश्वरता को त्यागना होगा।
ஜஸ்டின் ருஸ்ஸோ, மந்திரவாதி மருமகள் பில்லிக்கு வழிகாட்டவும், சக்திகளை கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரவும் மரணத்தை கைவிட வேண்டும்.
మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்

న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World

చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ

డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా
programme.desc: Miley Stewart, an average teenage girl, lives a double life as a famous pop singer named Hannah Montana and constantly tries to conceal her true identity from the public.
माइली स्टीवर्ट, एक औसत किशोरी लड़की, हन्ना मोंटाना नामक एक प्रसिद्ध पॉप गायिका के रूप में दोहरी जिंदगी जीती है और लगातार अपनी असली पहचान जनता से छिपाने की कोशिश करती है।
பிரபல பாடகியான மைலி, ஹானா மோன்டனா பெயரில் இரட்டை வாழ்க்கை வாழ்வதோடு, தனது உண்மையான அடையாளத்தை மறைக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
మైలీ స్టీవర్ట్ అనే ఒక సాధారణ అమ్మాయి, హన్నా మోంటానా అనే ప్రసిద్ధ పాప్ సింగర్‌గా ద్వంద్వ జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ

लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Justin Russo must shed his mortality in order to mentor his wizard niece, Billie, and help her get her powers under control.
जस्टिन रूसो को अपनी जादूगरनी भतीजी बिली का मार्गदर्शन करने और उसकी शक्तियों को नियंत्रित करने में मदद करने के लिए अपनी नश्वरता को त्यागना होगा।
ஜஸ்டின் ருஸ்ஸோ, மந்திரவாதி மருமகள் பில்லிக்கு வழிகாட்டவும், சக்திகளை கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரவும் மரணத்தை கைவிட வேண்டும்.
మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।

విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie

డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Mission to the Moon
programme.desc: In the international race to the moon, the Norwegian mission is led by brilliant inventor Reodor from the village of Flaklypa. With Louis the Magpie as the brave astronaut, what could possibly go wrong? Quite a bit, actually – on the daring mission, secret passengers are discovered, hidden agendas are revealed, and nothing seems to work out the way it was planned. Louis and his friend Luca the Hedgehog are in for some surprises on their trip to the moon. The third film in the stop-motion trilogy featuring the beloved characters from the Flaklypa universe.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Four crazy anti-heroes, one pawsome adventure. Join special-agent Marnie and her friends as they team up and fight crime. Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin manages to convince the pack elders to let him sit Howlington Academy’s entrance test. Freddy must use all his poodle wits- and his best friend Batty’s help!- to win a place at the historically wolf-only academy.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s the first day of school, and Freddy immediately comes into conflict with bully Ivan, who blackmails him into stealing the sacred moonstone! But when Batty is exposed to the moonstone, she’s turned into a human girl!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy attempts to teach Batty how to be human, while searching for a cure for her new form. A class assignment to capture the mysterious ‘Golden Horn’ and prove who the ‘alpha’ wolf is goes awry when a wilderwolf attacks!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy becomes convinced that there’s a wilderwolf at Howlington, and launches a daring investigation to prove that it’s the school accountant, Mr Sminch. Howlington gets a new teacher, the super cool and charming Ric Rawls.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids are struck down by a flea infestation, and Freddy and Batty are tasked with tracking down the mysterious Doog, keeper of the Fleaminator, the most powerful flea treatment known to dog, before they’re all expelled!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids head out on their first excursion to Night Patrol HQ. Freddy gets pulled into Scarlet’s world as she gets closer to the truth about werewolves and the two bond when they get stuck in the forest while tracking a wolf.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s Howloween, and Howlington is on lockdown. But when the students stage a play that goes wrong and the lockdown is disrupted, it will be up to the kids to save the grown-ups from themselves - including Principal Pincus!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy and Ivan have failed their runes exam and have to do it over - or they won’t be allowed to attend the Doom Wolves concert. But their study session ends up putting themselves, and the Doom Wolves, in grave danger!

programme.title: Back to the Sea
programme.desc: When little fish Kevin is swept up in a net and taken from his home in the vast oceans to the small glass fish tank of a restaurant, he must find a way to escape and make his way back home.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: Frankie and Sophie challenge newcomers Zac and Charlie to an epic sled race.

programme.title: Son of Bigfoot
programme.desc: A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father only to discover that he's actually Bigfoot.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: The lovable Ozzy’s pampered life is thrown into turmoil after his family drops him at Blue Creek before their vacation. Ozzy quickly learns that Blue Creek is a dog prison and he’ll need to rely on some new friends to help him break out and get back home.

programme.title: Stardog & Turbocat
programme.desc: A loyal dog and a vigilante cat embark on a space age voyage to find their way home.

programme.title: Rally Road Racers
programme.desc: A rookie race-car driver gets the opportunity to compete against the reigning champion. With help from a former driver, he must overcome treacherous terrain, rival racers and unexpected obstacles to prove he has what it takes.

programme.title: Cats
programme.desc: A cat named Blanket lives in the city with his son, Cape. One day, Cape decides to leave home and embarks on an adventure to find the legendary cat's paradise. To find his son, Blanket must overcome his fear and reconcile with his past.

programme.title: Tall Tales
programme.desc: When his beloved Queen bee Marguerite is kidnapped, vagabond cricket Apollo who has been framed for the crime, teams up with the other bugs to save the Queen and the entire kingdom.

programme.desc: A boy at risk of being sent to boarding school by his Dad - and three aliens stranded due to watching too much TV - must help each other out.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.sub-title: The Curse of the Golden Master
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen has failed to bring the return of the Serpentine War but Clouse reveals there’s another way – his daughter has the ability to absorb the power of every fighter she comes across, so she can complete the ceremony.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja reunite with Wu and turn to the aid of a shrunken Pythor in order to figure out how to defeat the unstoppable Anacondrai.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja and fighters discover there’s a strategic location called The Corridor of Elders where they can make their last stand against Chen’s Anacondrai army... but even with the new Destiny Bounty, their forces still aren’t strong enough.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu’s staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn’t keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja hear of another way to learn Airjitzu - from the ghost of Sensei Yang at his haunted temple - but there’s a warning; if you are trapped in it by sunrise, you will become a ghost, too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Now that the Ninja know Airjitzu, they get briefed about how the next stage to finding the tomb is to get ‘The Sword of Sanctuary’ from Cloud Kingdom, which can only be reached from the top of the Wailing Alps.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In Cloud Kingdom, a realm where destinies are written, the Ninja must get the Sword of Sanctuary, a powerful relic that can see past the traps surrounding the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master – but tensions are high as Moro’s escape from the Cursed …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja now have all the items they need to get to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master but before they can figure out the last riddle that leads to the location of the tomb.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja use Ronan’s airship to travel to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master in an underwater cave under the ocean, only to find out Moro is already there.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro uses the Realm Crystal to open a portal to the Cursed Realm, ghosts take over the town - but the Ninja, in disguise, manage to get Lloyd to the center of the town and Lloyd steals the crystal…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the ghosts converge around and mobilize the Preeminent into a hulking giant behemoth, the Ninja use Airjitzu to fight the mobile beast in an attempt to slow it down.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.sub-title: On a Wish and a Prayer
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Day of the Departed
programme.sub-title: LEGO Ninjago: Day of the Departed
programme.desc: Cole returns to Yang’s haunted temple to seek revenge on the former Airjitzu Master who turned him into a ghost, he accidentally uses a Dark Magic blade that unleashes the spectral forms of Ninjago’s greatest villains and traps himself in the temple!

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the midst of an epidemic of mysterious metal thefts by the Vermillion Warriors, Lloyd realizes that stepping up and taking over for the ailing Master Wu is not an easy task.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

Friends Fright Challenge

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: The Warrior Within
programme.desc: Cragger tricks Laval into withholding CHI from the Crocodile tribe. This reignites the hostilities between the Lions and Crocodiles. Laval must frantically escape the wrath of the Crocs and somehow get rid of the CHI before his father finds out.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect

programme.title: The Spectral Lands
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.title: The Great Zane Robbery
programme.desc: Zane's search for Arin leads to an old friend but lands him in the middle of the Forbidden Five's hunt for the Prismatic Blades.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: Stampede!
programme.desc: While stranded in the jungle during a massive storm, Claire and Simon unknowingly stumble upon a clue to the whereabouts of the treasure sought by Sinjin.

programme.title: Dreamocracy
programme.desc: In order to consolidate his power within the dream world, Izzie suggests that Dreamsmasher holds an election to become the legendary dream keeper!

programme.title: Freak-quencies
programme.desc: After discovering the identity of Dreamsmasher, the dream chasers must figure out a way to stop him before he changes the dream world permanently.

programme.title: Animal Ambulance
programme.desc: The team springs into action for a a puppy hit by car, Westie's unusual surgery and a Staffordshire that fears fireworks.

programme.title: Bear Whisperer
programme.desc: As tourists fill the resort, Bear Whisperer Steve Searles handles massive black bears, facing danger, tough decisions, and uneasy coexistence.

programme.title: Bear Whisperer
programme.desc: In Mammoth Lakes, three young bears roam town for the first time. Bear Whisperer Steve Searles must teach them boundaries before trouble turns tragic.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV demonstrates how Sand Tiger Sharks act as protectors and takes a Deeper Dive by explaining male vs female shark differences, shark reproduction, Gray Reef Sharks and shark buoyancy.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV goes on a hunt for Megalodon Shark teeth and takes a Deeper Dive with Megalodon Sharks, Prickly Sharks, and Sand Tiger Sharks.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV showcases Bottom-Dwelling Sharks and does a Deeper Dive analyzing how Sharks Breathe, Wobbegong Sharks and Caribbean Reef Sharks.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV
programme.sub-title: Zebra Sharks in the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV searches for Zebra Sharks in the Indian Ocean, features amazing shark performances in the Philippines and does a Deeper Dive by examining shark finning and Thresher Sharks.

programme.title: Doug to the Rescue
programme.desc: In the season finale, Doug takes his drone to the tornado-ravaged twons of Kentucky to rescue the slew of cats and dogs that have been lost in the brutal December storm.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: In a display case at Harvard University's Warren Anatomical Museum is one of the most astonishing objects in medical science – the shattered skull of a 19th century American railway worker.

programme.title: Evidence Of The Unexplained
programme.desc: Trouble on the border – a UFO is captured on camera. Is it being used for smuggling by wealthy drug gangs, or is there a less earthly explanation? A woman is filmed as she disappears from her bed – is she being abducted by aliens as she claims?

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: A man survives six lightning strikes, while a toddler is frozen solid and thawed unharmed.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Three stories that suggest aliens are among us: a Mexican rancher slays a terrifying and mysterious creature that's genetically unlike any species on Earth, and is later burned to death in his car.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: The Alien Disclosure Files is a series that delves into these current and historical unexplained incidents and brings together leading experts in the fields of ufology and the paranormal to try to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Dance Together
programme.desc: An injured dancer and a shy Deaf girl overcome bullies, disability stigma, and other high school obstacles.

programme.title: The Single's Guidebook
programme.desc: A content creator making a series about singlehood meets her match in polar-opposite, Jackson.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Tiny's bar will close unless he pays $17K customers rally to save it. Meanwhile, Jay's hazing alarms.

programme.title: Tiny Town
programme.desc: Join the friendly vehicles of Tiny Town as they play games, go on adventures and solve problems together.

programme.title: Roger
programme.desc: The lively adventures of a little girl, the carefree, joyful and occasionally perky Fatou, and an alien, the clumsy Roger, on a tropical island… Throughout their adventures, they trigger small accidents that sometimes grow into major disasters, but (almost) always end on a happy note. In short, Roger and Fatou spend their time saving the island from their own mistakes and blunders.

programme.title: RoboFuse
programme.desc: RoboFuse - Saving the Parade: It's Ben's Parade in Car City. Zitron escapes from jail, planning to ruin the fun, but Robo foils his plan.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Sprinter Galore
programme.desc: The good-hearted Sprinter Galore is back at his home planet, battling evil villains bent.

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: The series revolves around re-awakened Monster DNA, called Monsuno, that finds its way into the unsuspecting hands of adventure-seeking teenagers Chase, Jinja, and Bren. Accompanied by their Monsuno, Lock, Charger, and Quickforce, they are searching for Chase's father Jeredy Suno, the creator of the Monsuno
